narrative:
Southwest Local Sd (Hamilton) school district has 20,727 registered voters, with 56.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 24.7 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -8.2% D−R vs -36.1% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
